input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON files, but those formats live in optional Hoplite modules outside hoplite-core. Tests for this issue should not require those optional parser modules unless deliberately expanding scope beyond the requested artifact.

If generated tests choose to exercise system-property or environment-variable sources, they should set and clean up those values inside the test, but this is not required for meaningful hoplite-core coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is required. hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 is an in-process Kotlin/JVM configuration library whose resolved artifact depends only on Kotlin stdlib, kotlin-reflect, and kotlinx-coroutines; meaningful coverage is reachable with core APIs such as ConfigLoaderBuilder, MapPropertySource, PropsParser, decoders, preprocessors, and classpath/resource loaders without Docker, extra Maven modules, or environment/system properties.
